untranslatable_reason: Signal requires detection of 'pre-formed opinion vs price action weighting' (opinion_weight_vs_price_weight: 0.2:0.8) and 'market structure contradiction' evaluation, which are qualitative/behavioral concepts not expressible as quantitative indicator conditions. Also requires 'rejection of entry if thesis contradicts structure' logic which needs forward-looking sentiment assessment unavailable in price/volume indicators.
translation_notes: Translated entry conditions to: price breaking resistance/support (pivot-based) with volume confirmation and directional bar confirmation. Exit conditions mapped to: reversal below support (s1) for longs, above resistance (r1) for shorts. The core philosophical shift from opinion-following to price-action-following cannot be fully captured in mechanical rules without sentiment/intent indicators.
